name: create_storage_zone
description: Create a new edge storage zone for hosting files directly on Bunny's global network. Useful for static assets, media, and downloads.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the storage zone. Must be unique and will be used in the storage hostname.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.description: The primary storage region. Options include DE (Germany), NY (New York), LA (Los Angeles), SG (Singapore), SYD (Sydney).

parameters.name: ReplicationRegions
parameters.description: Additional regions to replicate files to for redundancy and faster global access.

parameters.name: ZoneTier
parameters.description: The storage tier. 0 for Standard, 1 for Edge (SSD-backed, lower latency).
